title: A question about reis I II and III
display_title: A question about reis I II and III
wikitext:
[]: A question about reis I, II, and III             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Thu May 10, 2007 9:00 am Are they divided only by their outfits? For example, is Rei II only Rei II because she's the plug suit Rei? I've heard people defining them in these terms, so I'm wondering if that's actually the case. I mean, they CAN change their clothes and everything.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu May 10, 2007 9:06 am Rei I - the young Rei that was killed by Naoko Akagi Rei II - the Rei we see through the majority of the series up to the point when Unit-0 self-destructs Rei III - the Rei we see after Unit-0 blows up Each subsequent number shows that this Rei is a replacement for the previous Rei. It has nothing to do with clothing.

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Thu May 10, 2007 9:24 am Oh! Yeah! Well, thank you!

[]: Re: A question about reis I, II, and III             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 10, 2007 9:32 am perfected_sound wrote: I've heard people defining them in ... terms [of their outfits], so I'm wondering if that's actually the case.

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Thu May 10, 2007 9:45 am Sorry! Wow, that owl really does look like it's laughing, though.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 10, 2007 9:52 am I'm sorry, I couldn't help myself. This has to be one of the silliest questions I've heard in a while. Outfits! lawl.

[]:             Quote Post by perfected_sound » Thu May 10, 2007 10:14 am Gblughbgbg I only saw it once... And it's all so confusing! There's a Rei and another one and then she dies and then the whole show in in Shinji's head! This is probably another reason why I like Asuka better. You know. She exists. Oh, and she's hot.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu May 10, 2007 10:33 am To be fair, in this image , the aspects of Rei can be distinguished by what they might be wearing.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 10, 2007 10:51 am perfected_sound wrote: This is probably another reason why I like Asuka better. You know. She exists. Oh, and she's hot.
